title: Where Are We Right Now — Oct 2025 founder gut-check
html:
TL;DR

  • Oct 4, 2025 Austin solo gut-check — Yahir flags the AEO agency as "slow and a bit retarded" and lays out the path: mass scrape with the pipeline, cold-call no-website prospects, sell AEO to those with sites.
  • Brotein verdict at 9 months in: "stagnant. This is going to take marketing. Marketing marketing marketing... I feel a bit meh about it. The fire dies if I don't work on it." Identifies Cam's "shitty co-founderness" as why the baby-feeling has diminished.
  • Proposed Brotein survival route: pair with a creator, sell it to them, let them be the proprietor pushing it — early surrender / hand-off framing.
  • Action items: long call with Cam about Brotein direction; tell Cam about the AEO agency (short-term); think bigger — "continueing connecting dots, what do people need solved."
  • Sits exactly 13 days before AEO cold call prospecting and 16 days before the polished bridge income resume — the same week Yahir starts diversifying away from sole founder bets.

Notes

This is a founder loneliness artifact in miniature: the AEO agency is real (pipeline + clear path to revenue) but feels small; Brotein is loved but stalled and the cofounder isn't matching effort. The Cam critique here is the same arc captured in his entity page: "result-driven not mission-driven" → diminishing baby-feeling → hand-off temptation. Yahir's "pair with a creator" exit-route is the first time he openly considers giving up control of Brotein to keep it alive.

The "BIG THIGNS. Smaller app things" line is the both and voice — agency cash flow + mass scraping (do scale) AND smaller exploratory app bets (don't scale). Closes with "Lets get a grip here" — the tone of self-reset.

Connections

  • founder loneliness 2022 2026 — the central thread
  • brotein · aeo agency · cam jipp — the three nodes of the gut-check
  • 2025 10 17 aeo cold call prospecting · 2025 10 20 quality resume — same-month follow-throughs
  • do things that dont scale — the operating frame Yahir is invoking
  • aeo competitor arc — written 19 days before the Peekaboo collision; the AEO agency described here is the offer that gets repositioned

related.label: Quality Resume (Oct 2025) — Health Coach + Brotein lead + Occam intern + bilingual + ISSA CPT
